meaning: n.(伊斯兰教)瓦哈比教派的教义和习俗
examples: Men wearing the short trousers and long beards associated with Wahhabism are subject to random security checks.
Perhaps as an effect of the importation, Wahhabism takes a less strict form in Qatar than in Saudi Arabia, though it still governs a large portion of Qatari mores and rituals.
At the same time he sees the king as a genuine if unlikely reformer, doing his best to bring about social and educational change and soften the edges of unreconstructed Wahhabism.
It is unclear what connection, if any, the Wahhabism has with the espionage charges.
Wahhabism is a strict form of Islam which requires a literal interpretation of the Koran.
